title: poa grandis
intro: Poa grandis, also known as the blue fescue grass, is a species of grass native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues and reducing the severity of colds and flu. It can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
